policy: Core + Theme: morning brief stays compact; theme reports are run when a trigger fires or the user asks for deeper analysis.

triggerCandidates: NVDA earnings week, major product launch, or large AI infrastructure partnership
TSMC/ASML capacity, CoWoS, EUV, export-control or geopolitical headline
Data-center power/cooling bottleneck headline affecting VRT or hyperscaler CapEx
ai-semiconductor-infrastructure.defaultCadence: manual-or-triggered; do not run daily by default
